title: Pakkam Vanthu Lyrics Kaththi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song:Pakkam Vanthu - Kaththi
Singer:Anirudh, Hip Hop Tamilan Adhi
Movie:Kaththi,
Music:Anirudh,

you know what
guess this back
we are back baby

ah penne paar
ah oru muttam thaali
ah en pakkam vaa
ah enai anaithida vaa
ah penne ottrai muththam podhumaa
illai latcham muththam vendumaa
adi ennavendru solluma

en nenjam thudikkudhu
unnai nenaithida
kaigal pidiththida
manasadhu thudikkudhu
unmai thaan
paithiyam pidikkudhu
vaithiyam paarthidu
ennai nee konjam thottu paar

penne endhan ulagam neethaan
naan andha nilavai suttrivaravaa
unnai ..
muththam ondrai thandhu vittaal
mukthi adaivaai

vinmeen thaan adhu
kaadhal thaan kondadhu pole
naan unmeedhu kondidavaa
unnai muththangal ittu
pin vetkathil vittuthaan
manjathil konjithaan vendridavaa

unnai paarthaale podhumey
aayiram jenmangal meendum
pirandhonnai serndhiduven

ennai paakkaamal pogaadhey
nenjamthaan thaangaadhey
ullangayil unnai thaangiduven

DANCE..
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
muththangal thaa

penne endhan kannai paar
ulle latcham vennila
undhan kangal ennai kandhadhum
latchangal kodiyaai marudhammaa
adi ponadhu pogattum
kaayangal aarattum
eppodhum naan unnai kanavil pakka
aasaigal vandhidum aanandham thandhidum
indru mudhal indha paattai nee ketka

mugaththil irukku sirippu
aana ullukkul edhukku morappu
adi agaththin azhagu mugaththil theriyum
idhuthaan ennoda karuththu

enthaan neeyum paarkka
aasaigal vandhu ennai thaakka
meendum naan unnaye paakka
kadhal vandhu nenjam malarndhadhey
ulagam marandhadhye
ah unnaal pudhidhaai pirandhadhey
adi yen ippadi nigalndhadhu
iru uyir ondraai kalandhadhu

adiye ippo yen sirithaai
idhayam sattena nee pariththaai
unmai mattum endhan nenjam
ninaithidudhey

Maname maname oru
ponna thaedi naan tholanjen
maname  maname
unna kaadhalaala naan karanjen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, inviting listeners to embrace happiness and togetherness.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Kaththi, the song represents moments of joy and unity among characters, enhancing the film's energetic vibe.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features vocals by Anirudh and Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was the song released?

Pakkam Vanthu was released on September 17, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pakkam Vanthu, the upbeat rhythm and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song is a pivotal moment in Kaththi, showcasing the characters' happiness and camaraderie. With its infectious energy, it encourages listeners to dance and enjoy life. The collaboration between Anirudh and Hip Hop Tamizha adds a unique flair, making it a memorable track in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pakkam Vanthu is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Anirudh's electrifying beats and Hip Hop Tamizha's dynamic vocals, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious energy of this song from the blockbuster Kaththi!
stanzaMeanings: Guess what, we are back baby.
Hey girl, look, just a kiss is enough. Come to me, come and embrace me. Is one kiss enough, or do you want more? Tell me what you want.
My heart beats thinking of you. My hands want to hold you. My mind is crazy for the truth. Look at me, just touch me a little.
Girl, you are my world. Will you revolve around me? If you give me a kiss, it will be liberation.
It’s like a love that feels like a dream. I will hold you with the truth. I will give you kisses and then let you go. I will keep you in my heart.
Just seeing you is enough. I will be born a thousand times again to be with you.
Don’t go without looking at me. My heart can’t bear it. I will hold you in my heart.
Come close and give me some kisses (3)
DANCE.. Come close and give me some kisses, come close and give me some kisses, come close and give me some kisses, come close and give me some kisses.
Girl, look into my eyes. Those eyes are like the moon, and when you see me, they shine. Even if they fade away, I will always dream of you and find happiness. Today, listen to this song.
Your smile is on your face, but why is there sadness inside? The beauty of your heart shows on your face, that’s my opinion.
You too have dreams that pull me towards you. I will look at you again. Love has bloomed in my heart, and the world has forgotten. You were born to be special, that’s why you are like this.
Why are you smiling now? Your heart is pure. Only the truth is what my heart thinks about.
Oh my heart, I searched for a girl and found you. Oh my heart, I fell in love with you.
Come close and give me some kisses. Come close and give me some kisses. Come close and give me some kisses.
Oh my heart, I searched for a girl and found you. Oh my heart, I fell in love with you.
